configurations.name: 默认配置
configurations.description: 自动创建的默认工具配置

tools.name: scene
node
tools.description:
Node CRUD — create/find/modify/delete nodes, list all nodes, set transform.
Actions: find, info, list, tree, create, delete, modify, move, duplicate.
Use "info" (NOT get_info). Node param accepts UUID, path, or name.
Example: {action:"list"} or {action:"info", node:"Canvas/Player"}

tools.name: component
tools.description:
Component management — add/remove/configure components on nodes.
Actions: add, remove, list, info, set_property, click_event, batch_click_event.
Use "info" to view component properties (NOT get_properties).
batch_click_event: bind click events on multiple buttons in one call.
Example: {action:"info", node:"Canvas/Btn", componentType:"cc.Button"}

tools.name: prefab
asset
tools.description:
Asset operations — query/search/create/delete assets, path-UUID conversion, sprite border.
Common: query_uuid, find_by_name, search, create, delete, set_sprite_border.
set_sprite_border: Set nine-patch border on a texture for SLICED mode.
Example: {action:"set_sprite_border", url:"db://assets/textures/btn.png", top:10, bottom:10, left:15, right:15}

tools.name: editor
view
composite
knowledge
validate
template
capture
tools.description:
Scene snapshot (2.x) — get structured JSON of scene/node layout for AI understanding.
Actions: scene_snapshot (full scene), node_snapshot (focused subtree).
Returns position, size, components, widget info for layout analysis.
Example: {action:"scene_snapshot"} or {action:"node_snapshot", node:"Canvas/Panel"}

tools.name: builder
tools.description:
Build node tree from JSON (2.x) — create complete hierarchies with components in one call.
Use this for complex multi-level UI structures.
Action: build.
Type shortcuts: type:"label" (auto-adds cc.Label, use text/fontSize), type:"sprite" (auto-adds cc.Sprite), type:"button" (auto-adds cc.Sprite+cc.Button+child Label, use text/fontSize), type:"toggle" (cc.Sprite+cc.Toggle+Checkmark child), type:"slider" (cc.Sprite+cc.Slider+Handle child), type:"progressbar" (cc.Sprite+cc.ProgressBar+BarFill child), type:"editbox" (cc.Sprite+cc.EditBox).
Example: {action:"build", parent:"Canvas", tree:{name:"Panel", size:{width:400,height:300}, components:["cc.Sprite"], children:[{name:"Title", type:"label", text:"Hello", fontSize:32}]}}

tools.name: animation
spine
tools.description:
Spine (sp.Skeleton) — query animations/skins, set animation/skin, change properties.
Actions: info, list_animations, list_skins, set_animation, set_skin, set_property.
Note: "node" is the node path, UUID, or name with sp.Skeleton component.
Properties for set_property: loop, timeScale, premultipliedAlpha, defaultCacheMode, useTint, debugSlots, debugBones.
Example: {action:"list_animations", node:"spineNode"} or {action:"set_animation", node:"spineNode", animation:"idle"}

tools.name: label
devtools
